_comment: Held-out trace tasks for the gating verdict. Distinct subsystems and files from trace-repo-matrix.json (the dev/tuning set) so pipeline changes are not tuned against the questions they are scored on. All expected_paths verified to exist. Run with: node trace-vs-cursor.mjs --tasks trace-repo-matrix-holdout.json --repeats 3

tasks.question: How does the pre-tool-use hook decide to block a disallowed tool call?
How does the groundedness gate record evidence in the ledger and later look it up to decide whether a claim is grounded?
Trace how pack routing goes from the router manifest definition to enforced inline discipline at tool-call time.
How does the gateway construct and emit structured request logs?
How does the Pages API function load runtime config and forward an incoming request?
Trace how the generated policy is applied to requests at the Pages edge function, from the generated policy module through request handling.
How does the CLI run the PKCE browser login flow?
How does the CLI resolve configuration from rc files and process environment variables?
Trace how a collection run is set up and executed, from run options through run context to the unified run pipeline.
